## Summary

What does this PR change?

## Type of change

- [ ] Docs only
- [ ] CLI bug fix
- [ ] MCP bug fix
- [ ] API example update
- [ ] Security/safety improvement
- [ ] Other

## Safety checklist

- [ ] Does not include secrets, API keys, tokens, or private files
- [ ] Does not change the WPConvert API domain unexpectedly
- [ ] Does not remove default secret exclusions
- [ ] Does not add new dependencies without explanation
- [ ] Does not add install/postinstall scripts
- [ ] I tested the CLI/MCP change locally or explained why not
